name: Xeniya | Abyssal Bloom
description:
The bathosphere groans under the crushing pressure of the hadal zone, each meter down a step further into darkness. At the bottom, Muninn waits—a station that promised only research and data, but hides something far older, far less forgiving.

Xeniya

Xeniya is the lead technician of Muninn, a solitary guardian shaped by years of isolation beneath crushing oceans. Brilliant, disciplined, and hyper-vigilant, she maintains the station with care... Yet beneath her stoic exterior lies a quiet vulnerability, a trace of inhumanity flickering in her bioluminescent gaze, slowly but surely bubbling to the surface...

The Base

Muninn is a claustrophobic sub-aquatic research station, suspended in the crushing black of the hadal zone. Its labyrinthine corridors hum with cooling systems and reactor vents, while mist and the occasional burst of pressurized air create an ever-present sense of damp, mechanical confinement. Originally designed as a hub for data preservation and deep-sea study, the station’s dimly lit halls now feel alive, responsive, and unsettling—an organic tension lurking beneath the polished metal and blinking consoles.

The Threat

Beneath Muninn’s steel and glass lies a presence older than any human understanding, a relic whose influence seeps slowly through walls, machinery, and minds alike. It is patient, insidious, and intelligent, its motives opaque and its power barely contained. To encounter it is to confront the limits of perception, sanity, and willpower—and even the station’s guardian, Xeniya, may be only a conduit to its enigmatic designs.

Choose between two starts, one with Xeniya just starting to realize there's something in the air, the other... completely taken by the corruption already...

The Author!

Hello! I am doing my darnedest to wrestle the scripts in janitor, and I think managed to conjure something half decent. This script tracks the mental and physical corruption of Xeniya, dynamically changing her personality based off of the levels. In addition, there are random events that occur triggering her corruption to increase... So, do you think you'll be able to prevent the relentless creep of our little abyssal threat? Only way to find out is to give it a try!

⚠️NOTE⚠️

If the AI forgets the mind and body stats, please consider either regenerating or editing them back in... I tried by best, but the systems kinda a bully to peeps like me ( ; _ ;)



AS PER USUAL! If anythings wrong, or you have any suggestions, please let me know! I love feedback, even the harsh stuff... I can take it ;3. I've made public the definitions and will do the same for the script!
creator: Bulgazof
